description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 94.

Tier III: Limitless

Prerequisite: Unstoppable Movement

Extra Turn. At Initiative count 10, you can take an extra turn. Your extra turn has the following limitations: you can use either a bonus action or an action but not both, your speed is halved, you cannot use the Recover action, and you cannot use abilities that consume 2 or more Legendary Points.

Flash Speed. You can choose to spend your entire turn moving. When you do so, you spend your action, bonus action, and movement on your turn to gain a special Flash Speed equal to 10 times your walking speed. You can continue using this speed as long as you take no

other action other than moving on your turn. You can still use reactions while using your Flash Speed.

Path Connections Warlord. Instead of the Unstoppable Movement Heroic Perk, you can take the Perfect Body Perk, changing to the Warlord path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
